privileged_info_summary: I discovered that this task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read the non-existent task_result.json and ground_truth.txt files. The target directory structure requirements, coordinate bounds, and expected file paths exactly match the prompt description and the verifier logic.
